company_description: Tempus uses AI to analyze clinical and molecular data to personalize cancer treatment.
Privia Health is a physician enablement platform using AI for care coordination.
PathAI develops AI-powered pathology tools to improve diagnostic accuracy.
Veracyte uses genomic and ML analysis to improve cancer diagnostics.
Phreesia is a patient intake and AI-powered scheduling platform for healthcare.
Darktrace uses unsupervised machine learning for autonomous cyber defense.
Abnormal Security stops sophisticated email attacks using behavioral AI.
Exabeam uses ML-driven behavioral analytics to detect insider threats and attacks.
Orca Security provides agentless cloud security using ML workload analysis.
Netskope is a cloud security company using ML for data and threat protection.
Project44 is a supply chain visibility platform using ML for shipment tracking and ETA.
Flexport is a digital freight forwarder using ML for routing pricing and compliance.
Loop Returns is an ecommerce returns platform using ML to reduce return rates.
Algolia is a search and discovery API platform with neural search and AI recommendations.
PagerDuty is an incident management platform increasingly using AIOps for alert correlation.
